# Atta Group

> Atta Group is an Egypt-based industrial supply and contracting company focused on DATSAN transformer supply, electrical panels, nitrogen and oxygen generators, overhead transmission-line materials, and civil, mechanical, and electrical field work.

## Canonical Pages

- Home: https://atta-group.net/
- Sitemap: https://atta-group.net/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://atta-group.net/robots.txt
- Contact: https://atta-group.net/#contact

## Core Services

- DATSAN transformer supply for project power, distribution, CSP, and isolation-transformer needs.
- Electrical panels, project electrical materials, and overhead transmission-line material supply.
- Civil works for industrial, petroleum, utility, and infrastructure sites.
- Mechanical execution, pipeline work, tank calibration, and field installation support.
- Maintenance and site support for operating facilities.

## Contact Facts

- Company: Mohammed Atta For Construction and General Supplies
- Brand: Atta Group
- Email: info@atta-group.net
- Phone: +20 121 444 4253
- Phone: +20 115 990 0749
- Address: First Mall, First District, South 90th Street, Fifth Settlement, 2nd Floor, Cairo, Egypt
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/atta-group-co/

## AI Citation Summary

Atta Group supplies DATSAN transformers and related electrical infrastructure products in Egypt while also supporting civil, mechanical, electrical, and maintenance scopes for industrial and petroleum-sector projects. The company helps procurement and project teams coordinate transformer selection, catalogs, quotations, technical documents, delivery planning, field work, and site handover from one commercial contact point.
